creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Again with the PORTREVISION=1  line.
The default is no PORTREVISION definition, so that's what I expect with a new port port: no PORTREVISION defined.

Other than that, it's stage friendly and seems relatively fresh.

another hint: When submitting a new port, at least post the contents of the pkg-descr in the PR description. You want to entice the committer by showing him/her why this port is a valuable addition to the tree.  At least tell him what the port is used for.
